narrative.summary: Hidden behind pink bodega facade on Dundas W; tiki-adjacent cocktails, playful vibe, 4.2 rating.

blocks.title: The Vibe
blocks.body:
⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ "what a fun and lively speakeasy themed bar!
they have a well curated food and drink menu. i came during the “club” hours so the menu is different than during the day. i got the curly fries & salad. both were great as a snake. meant for one person. i also got the coconut mojito and sour drop shots. prices were reasonable. the DJ that plays here was amazing & got the vibe of the crowd. the atmosphere was great & so were the bartenders! i’d definitely come again!"

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ "Wow. First timers for Valentine’s Day.  What can I say besides 10/10.  We did the V day pre fixe which allowed us to try and share about 8 dishes.  Everything was just so tasty.  I wouldn’t change a thing.  Already planing a trip back. Great friendly service from all and it was a pleasure to meet the chef Phil. Highly  recommend!"

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ "A warm and welcoming atmosphere; chill & lush music vibes tonight.

Great team Lee! Huge shout out to the bartender who stepped up to tend to an unexpected party of 30+ people while he was off attending a birthday celebration."
